    • Method Detail

      • main

        public static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
        Parameters:
        args - the command line arguments

      • SetBondPot

        public void SetBondPot(int[][] bondlist,
                       double[] bondlength,
                       double[] bondconst)
        Initialize the Bond Potential Arrays.
        Parameters:
        bondlist - Array of the bonds
        bondlength - Array of the bond length
        bondconst - Array of the bond constant
        See Also:
        molecularModeling.CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent)

      • SetAnglePot

        public void SetAnglePot(int[][] anglelist,
                        double[] angle,
                        double[] angleconst)
        Initialize the Angle potential Arrays.
        Parameters:
        anglelist - Array of three connected atoms
        angle - Array of angle values from database
        angleconst - Array of angle constant
        See Also:
        molecularModeling.CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent)

      • SetDihedPot

        public void SetDihedPot(int[][] dihedlist,
                        double[][] dihed,
                        double[][] dihedconst)
        Initialize the Dihedrals potential Arrays.
        Parameters:
        dihedlist - Array of four connected atoms
        dihed - Array of dihedrals value from database file
        dihedconst - Array of dihedral constant
        See Also:
        molecularModeling.CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent)

      • CalculateGeometry

        public double[][] CalculateGeometry(double[][] cord,
                                    double[] mass)
        From here down is the algorithm for calculating geometry of the provided molecular structure.
        Parameters:
        cord - Array of Coordinates from the table
        mass - Array of mass values from the table
        Returns:
        Array of new coordinates
        See Also:
        molecularModeling.CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent)
